author: Antigravity
Dabblecraft2DevTeam
name: Leveler
install_msg: Thanks for installing Leveler! Use `[p]levelset` to configure the cog.
short: A highly customizable leveling cog with image generation and economy integration.
description: A leveling cog inspired by Mee6 and Stevy's leveler. Features custom profile and level-up cards, XP scaling, Red economy integration for cosmetics, and an API for other cogs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores the following data per user: Discord user ID, guild ID, XP count, level, prestige level, bio text, and cosmetic preferences (background image, title color, bar color). This data is stored in a SQLite database on the server (or MySQL if configured). Data is retained indefinitely until the user requests deletion. Users can request deletion of all their data by running [p]mydata forgetme, which removes all leveling data from the database and config. Users can also request a copy of their data by running [p]mydata getdata.
